missing_elements: δ must be independent of x (not just of ε)
feedback: Good — you captured the ε-δ quantifier structure. The critical distinction to add: emphasize that δ depends ONLY on ε, not on the base point x. Without this, you have only proved pointwise continuity. Also, mention Cantor's Theorem: if the domain is compact and f is continuous, uniform continuity follows immediately.
